claim_text: Katyayani Trust identifies the current Vrindavan institution as Keshav Ashram, Radha Bagh, Vrindaban and attributes the temple consecration in 1923 to Swami Keshavanand.
notes: Current physical institutional footprint supported separately from AOAY.

claim_text: AOAY double verification remains incomplete because no controlled SRF/YSS edition passage with stable edition metadata was retrieved.
Fysieke plek bevestigd; actuele bezoekbaarheid niet betrouwbaar vastgesteld.
notes: Applied separately to all eight candidates.

claim_text: Current official operating management, recurring-practice schedule and visitor rules for Neem Karoli Baba Ashram Vrindavan were not reliably established.
UPBTVP and district authorities have public regional development and pilgrimage-infrastructure roles, but exclusive daily object management was not established.
notes: Regional involvement confirmed; object-level exclusivity remains open.

claim_text: Kusum Sarovar lies within recurring Govardhan parikrama practice, but a distinct fixed object-level recurring practice was not established.
notes: Circuit passage is not equivalent to a separate schedule.
